[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 1101011 5
2 1101010 4
3 1001101 4
4 1011111 6
5 1111100 5
6 0000000 a
7 0010110 3

70 07 0001110 3
